data_preparation_notes: v2 proxies derived to reduce colinearity: O is rolling-mean log1p(demand) (window=7).
R is recovery proxy defined as -diff(O) (positive when pressure decreases).
I is local instability proxy defined as rolling MAD of diff(O) (window=14).
All transformations are deterministic and declared here; no synthetic augmentation.

columns.description: Instability proxy (local MAD of pressure changes).
